MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendant William Biederman'S Profits And Financial Condition; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Jennifer Wilson
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Plaintiffs Jennifer Wilson and Paul Fortino's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendant William Biederman's Profits And Financial Condition is off calendar per the request of the moving.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendant William Biederman'S Profits And Financial Condition; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Jennifer Wilson
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Continued To Apr-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Attorney, John L. Schwab of the law offices of Tenant Law Group PC (888-510-7511) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Michael Francis Brown of the law offices of Michael F. Brown (925-824-3101) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party, William Biederman

Both parties to this motion stipulate to judge pro tem.

It is determined that, due to inadvertence and clerical error/miscummunication, this motion was previously taken off calendar in error. Counsel stipulate to a continuance.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFS JENNIFER WILSON and PAUL FORTINO'S Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendant William Biederman'S Profits And Financial Condition is CONTINUED for hearing on April 18, 2018 at 9:00 AM in Department 32/Discovery. Further notice is waived.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter J. Van Zandt; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
